name: etabs-mcp
description: MCP server for CSI ETABS via the ETABS COM API
long_description:
The ETABS MCP server enables Claude to interact with your ETABS models and perform tasks like geometry creation, load definition, analysis execution, result extraction, and frame design.

## Key Features
- **Full API coverage**: Joints, frames, areas, loads, analysis, results, and design via the ETABS COM API.
- **AI-friendly**: Built-in skills provide guidance on the ETABS API for geometry, loading, analysis, results, and design.
- **Sandboxed execution**: Code runs in a restricted Python sandbox Ã¢â‚¬â€ no arbitrary imports, no filesystem access.
- **Privacy-first**: All processing happens locally. No data is sent to the cloud.

Requires CSI ETABS 21 or later installed and running with a model open.

tools.name: discover_api
tools.description: Discover available API guidance and skills. Call this first before using other etabs-mcp tools.

tools.name: read_skills
tools.description: Read one or more skills by name. Each skill provides domain-specific guidance (geometry, loads, analysis, results, design).

tools.name: list_instances
tools.description: List all running ETABS instances with alias, PID, file path, and version.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Check the connection to ETABS. Returns connection state, version, model path, and lock status.

tools.name: execute_code
tools.description: Execute Python code in a sandbox against the ETABS COM API. The pre-connected 'model' variable is SapModel. Last expression or explicit 'result = ...' is returned.
